entity.label: Gath-rimmon
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A Levitical city in the tribe of Dan (Josh. 19:45; 21:24; 1 Chr. 6:69).

nodes.label: Gath-rimmon
nodes.description: A Levitical city in the tribe of Dan (Josh. 19:45; 21:24; 1 Chr. 6:69).

verses.text: And Jehud, and Beneberak, and Gathrimmon,
Aijalon with her suburbs, Gathrimmon with her suburbs; four cities.
And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gathrimmon with her suburbs:
